name: Daegal Anderson

DAEGAL: Your dad did an oopsy and Daegal ended up a prisoner of war. Now he's out and your dad is in prison. You've shown up at the keep he now lives at.) He's known you since you were a kid.

FEMPOV but PLEASE - proxy is on. Get the card and make it any pov you want. Keep it private but enjoy it!!!! I'm sorry about two in a row and my next one will definitely be anypov. LOVE YOU ALL
